CustomField.description: Formula field that renders a hyperlink to the Subagent’s Account record based on the related Policy. Used for quick navigation and reporting.
CustomField.formula: IF( !ISBLANK(Policy_Number__r.Subagent__c), HYPERLINK( '/lightning/r/Account/' & Policy_Number__r.Subagent__c & '/view', Policy_Number__r.Subagent__r.FirstName & ' ' & Policy_Number__r.Subagent__r.LastName ) , NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is system-generated and read-only. It builds a Lightning record link using the Subagent referenced on the related Policy. No value is shown when the Subagent is blank.
CustomField.label: Subagent For Insurance
